1000008.name: Windbloom
1000008.desc: When Velina enters the battlefield, she gains 45 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbloom</ct>. Using <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Purifying Rise</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Triple Deathblow</ct> grants 45 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbloom</ct>, up to a maximum of 135 points. With enough <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbloom</ct>, hold <IconSpecial /> or <IconNormal /> to launch <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Eye of the Storm</ct>.

desc.0: When using <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Hat Trick</ct>, the thrown hat:
desc.1: Is actually a Bangboo. While Top Hat Companion is on the field, it accumulates Preheated Chamber in Norma's place. When Norma retrieves the Top Hat Companion, all accumulated Preheated Chamber is transferred to her.
desc.2: Top Hat Companion inherits all of Norma's stats.

desc.0: The white turret summoned by <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: En-Nah Barrage</ct>:
desc.1: Automatically uses Special Attack: Target Practice at regular intervals. After deploying its missile bay, this skill is replaced with EX Special Attack: Explosive Experiment.
desc.2: En-Nah Turrets inherit all of Norma's stats.

desc.0: While Norma or her Top Hat Companion is on the field, gain 1.5% Preheated Chamber per second.
desc.1: When Preheated Chamber reaches 80% or higher, the Quick Assist triggered by Basic Attack: Hat Trick is <ct color=#FFFFFF>replaced with a Chain Attack</ct>.

desc.0: The buff gained from <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: En-Nah Barrage</ct>:
desc.1: During its active duration, two En-Nah Turrets are summoned to fight alongside Norma.
desc.2: When <ct color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability: Advantage in Numbers</ct> is triggered, Norma's ATK is further increased, and all squad members deal increased DMG.

desc.0: The debuff applied when Norma or her creations hit an enemy:
desc.1: For the duration of the effect, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier is increased, and the duration of its Stunned state is extended.

1000014.name: Windbite
1000014.desc: When Velina triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>, she gains 1 point of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct>. When Velina has 2 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct>, the next time she triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>, she consumes 2 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct> to increase that instance's DMG Multiplier.

1000015.name: Condensed Cyclone
1000015.desc: When Velina triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>, she summons a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Condensed Cyclone</ct> that deals <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>. When the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Condensed Cyclone</ct> dissipates, it triggers an explosion. If the explosion hits an enemy afflicted with a <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</ct>, it deals one instance of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG.

1000016.name: Sweeping Cyclone
1000016.desc: When Velina uses <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Eye of the Storm</ct> or triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct> while consuming 2 points of <tooltip ns=tooltips_gen baseKey18=1000014>Windbite</tooltip>, she summons a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> to continuously deal <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct> that is capable of triggering the <tooltip ns=tooltips_gen baseKey18=1000017>Chromatic Tint</tooltip> effect. When <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> attacks hit enemies, the enemy's <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly Buildup RES</ct> and the corresponding <ct color=#FFFFFF>Attribute Anomaly Buildup RES</ct> from <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chromatic Tint</ct> are reduced. When <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> dissipates, it triggers an explosion. If the explosion hits an enemy suffering a <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</ct>, it deals one instance of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG.

1000017.name: Chromatic Tint
1000017.desc: When <tooltip ns=tooltips_gen baseKey18=1000016>Sweeping Cyclone</tooltip> hits an enemy afflicted with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Contamination</ct> for the first time, it triggers the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chromatic Tint</ct> effect, converting into a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> of the corresponding attribute and dealing the corresponding attribute's DMG.

desc.0: Upon entering the battlefield, Pyrois gains 30 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Solar Prominence</ct>. Different attacks grant a certain amount of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Solar Prominence</ct> when they hit enemies, and Pyrois also gains a certain amount of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Solar Prominence</ct> every second.
desc.1: With 30 or more Solar Prominence, hold <IconNormal /> to activate Basic Attack: Celestial Light. Each hit from Basic Attack: Celestial Light consumes a certain amount of Solar Prominence.

1000019.name: Mirage
1000019.desc: Pyrois enters the Mirage state when using Ultimate: Total Annihilation. While in the Mirage state, Pyrois' Ultimate deals increased CRIT DMG against Stunned enemies.

1000020.name: Sunflare
1000020.desc: Pyrois enters the Sunflare state when using Ultimate: Triumphant Return. While Sunflare is active, Energy Generation Rate and DMG dealt increase, and triggering a Perfect Block with an EX Special Attack restores additional <tooltip ns=tooltips_gen baseKey18=1000018>Solar Prominence</tooltip>.

desc.0: Grants a special effect against Stunned enemies.
desc.1: When Pyrois triggers Totalize, additional DMG is dealt, and the target's Stunned state ends.

1000022.name: Cinderfire
1000022.desc: Gain Cinderfire when using a Chain Attack. All Cinderfire stacks are consumed upon using an Ultimate, granting a certain amount of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Decibels</ct> for each stack consumed.

desc.0: · <ct color=#FFAF2C>CRIT DMG RES, ATK, and Anti-Interrupt</ct> are increased while all Agents in the squad lose HP over time.
desc.1: · When the Corruptive Barrier is broken, a portion of HP is converted into HP for all Agents in the squad, and Energy is restored.

desc.0: · <ct color=#FFAF2C>DEF, DMG reduction</ct>, and <ct color=#FFAF2C>Anti-Interrupt</ct> are significantly enhanced, and the enemy will not be Stunned. Agents can deplete the Miasmic Shield through attacks.
desc.1: · When the Miasmic Shield is broken, enemies take <ct color=#FFAF2C>Purify</ct> DMG, and Agents <ct color=#FFAF2C>recover Energy or Adrenaline</ct>.

desc.0: · Skills <ct color=#FFAF2C>ignore the Invulnerable effect</ct> and have no flash prompts. Agents cannot activate their Ultimates during this time. Only one Agent switch is allowed per enemy attack, and each Agent can only perform one dodge.
desc.1: · <ct color=#FFAF2C>Defensive Assist</ct> or <ct color=#FFAF2C>Evasive Assist</ct> can be used to counter this skill. Successfully countering all skills inflicts the <ct color=#FFAF2C>Shutdown</ct> effect on the enemy, dealing massive DMG and accumulating a large amount of Daze.

10000081.name: Windbloom
10000081.desc: When Velina enters the battlefield, she gains 45 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbloom</ct>. Using <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Purifying Rise</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Triple Deathblow</ct> grants 45 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbloom</ct>, up to a maximum of 135 points. With enough <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbloom</ct>, hold <IconSpecial /> or <IconNormal /> to launch <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Eye of the Storm</ct>.
